title: FrutigerAeroDecor
description: This addition adds new blocks and frames to the frutiger aero style!
body:
# Frutiger Aero Decor

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4W9N428UcmE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![FrutigerAeroDecorLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b21edfb8c8bda976d6cf954a00871f8e5631215d.png)

### Compatibility
Neoforge / Forge / Fabric  

### Requirements
GECKOLIB (1.20.1 Forge)  

### Overview
Frutiger Aero Decor brings a futuristic and elegant style into your builds. This project introduces decorative blocks inspired by the vibrant colors and clean lines of the Frutiger Aero design language.  

### Features
Currently, it includes three chairs in fresh colors such as pink, green, and light blue, unique paintings with landscapes and illustrations (including artistic details that evoke Hatsune Miku), and a modern lamp with luminous fish floating inside and more!.  

### Future Plans
Future updates will expand the collection with more decorative elements, offering new creative possibilities for players who want their worlds to reflect a contemporary design full of freshness and originality.
